all.en: The lunch bell rang, and hungry students rushed into the noisy cafeteria.
all.zh: 午餐鐘聲響起，飢餓的學生們衝進嘈雜的餐廳。

all.en: Anna grabbed a tray and joined the long line at the hot food counter.
all.zh: 安娜拿起餐盤，加入了熱食櫃台前的長隊伍。

all.en: She chose spaghetti with meatballs, a side salad, and a carton of apple juice.
all.zh: 她選了肉丸義大利麵、一份配菜沙拉，還有一盒蘋果汁。

all.en: Her best friend Olivia was already saving a seat for her at the corner table.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友奧莉維亞已經在角落的桌子幫她佔好位子了。

all.en: They started chatting about the new English teacher who had given them so much homework.
all.zh: 她們開始聊起那位給了她們很多作業的新英文老師。

all.en: Olivia complained that the essay assignment was due on Monday morning.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞抱怨那篇作文作業要在週一早上交。

all.en: Anna offered to read Olivia's draft after lunch and give her some advice.
all.zh: 安娜提議午餐後讀奧莉維亞的草稿，並給她一些建議。

all.en: They also discussed plans for the upcoming weekend, including a possible movie night.
all.zh: 她們還討論了即將到來的週末計畫，包括可能的電影之夜。

all.en: A boy named Lucas walked over and asked if he could borrow Anna's calculator.
all.zh: 一個叫盧卡斯的男孩走過來，問安娜能否借他計算機。

all.en: Anna handed it to him, reminding him to return it before fifth-period class.
all.zh: 安娜把計算機遞給他，提醒他在第五節課前歸還。

all.en: When the warning bell rang, they quickly cleared their trays and hurried back to class.
all.zh: 當預備鐘響起時，她們迅速清理餐盤，匆忙趕回教室。
